## Design Notes

### Hero Image
- Split composition: Cape Town skyline (left) + investors/globe (right)
- Golden flow connecting both sides symbolizing wealth transfer
- Colors: Deep Atlantic Blue (#1E3A5F) to Gold (#D4AF37) gradient
- Includes multilanguage copy (English + Chinese)

### Inline Image
- Side-by-side comparison cards (Taiwan vs Western Cape)
- Key metrics: Rental Yield, Entry Price, Annual Growth, Currency
- Flat design with clear visual hierarchy

### CTA Background
- Smooth blue-to-gold gradient (left to right)
- Subtle Table Mountain silhouette watermark
- Geometric building lines as decoration
- 70% center area kept clear for text/buttons
